title: Lastrea duclouxii
intro: Lastrea duclouxii, also known as the Ducloux's lastrea, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Asia, characterized by its delicate fronds and intricate leaf structure. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Lastrea duclouxii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Lastrea duclouxii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is commonly used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
